scripts.build:html: node scripts/build-classes.js && node scripts/build-levels.js && node scripts/build-venues.js
scripts.build:css: sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-beta.scss docs/assets/theme-beta.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-epsilon.scss docs/assets/theme-epsilon.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-zeta.scss docs/assets/theme-zeta.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-eta.scss docs/assets/theme-eta.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-theta.scss docs/assets/theme-theta.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-iota.scss docs/assets/theme-iota.css
scripts.build: npm run build:html && npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.verify: npm run lint:css && npm run build && npm run test:contrast
